title: feat: CatGPT text-first generation with vision
author: voodoohop

gist.headline: The cats can see you now
gist.blurb: CatGPT just leveled up with vision capabilities! The sassy felines can now actually look at your avatar and deliver a highly personalized, vision-aware roast before generating your meme.
gist.summary: CatGPT has been updated to use a two-step generation flow with Claude-fast, enabling vision capabilities to analyze user images for context-aware text generation.
gist.impact: Users on both the web app and Discord bot will now receive highly personalized, image-aware cat roasts based on their avatars.
gist.visual_concept: A sassy pixel art cat and Polly the bee looking at a polaroid picture. The cat represents CatGPT's new vision capabilities, judging the photo to generate a roast.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of a sassy orange tabby cat and the cute bee mascot looking at a small polaroid picture together. The cat looks judgmental and is typing on a retro keyboard. Soft lime green (#ecf874) and peach gradient background. Chunky retro sprites, warm lighting, lo-fi vibes like Stardew Valley. Nostalgic but beautiful, emotionally warm.

image.prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of a sassy orange tabby cat and the cute bee mascot looking at a small polaroid picture together. The cat looks judgmental and is typing on a retro keyboard. Soft lime green (#ecf874) and peach gradient background. Chunky retro sprites, warm lighting, lo-fi vibes like Stardew Valley. Nostalgic but beautiful, emotionally warm.
